creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text: A lot of options are unfortunately undocumented with clang :(... see this thread for more details: http://clang-developers.42468.n3.nabble.com/clang-1-3-4-manpage-documentation-is-sparse-need-help-figuring-out-available-options-in-compiler-td4042738.html (tl;dr: submit a patch to our project and we'll accept it :/...).
